creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: There have been 3 releases of fractgen since it was added to ports. I've just patched the 2.1.7 release for Qt 5.15.2, but it'd be nice to just catch up with upstream releases. Note that there is a PR (against 2.1.10) specifically for Qt 5.15.2 compatibility, so there's more to do than just update to that release.
